title: Align frozen ABI allowlist order with RUNTIME_EXPORT_SYMBOLS

source.subject: test(abi): align frozen allowlist order with RUNTIME_EXPORT_SYMBOLS

body:
Frozen ABI golden tests now list symbols in the same order as `RUNTIME_EXPORT_SYMBOLS`, preventing spurious allowlist drift when Phase B exports expand.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`e9dd535`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/e9dd535)
- **Subject:** test(abi): align frozen allowlist order with RUNTIME_EXPORT_SYMBOLS
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
